default_binding.D_LANDMARK: a narrow secret path under the stems
default_binding.A1_ACT: sketches the footprints slowly and neatly
default_binding.A2_ACT: scoots along and smudges a few
default_binding.F1_ACT: waits still as a garden statue
default_binding.F2_ACT: holds out a green leaf, low and still
default_binding.G_ACT: rows of clover and crunchy greens
default_binding.H_ACT: a knee-high fence with a small gate
default_binding.I_ACT: walks the class through the case

slots.meaning: The child protagonist, a junior garden detective.
slots.guidance: A single kid-relatable detective (name or role); curious and gentle, never reckless.

slots.meaning: The adult who supervises the garden and the class.
slots.guidance: A warm, trusted grown-up (teacher/gardener); present at the start and at the kind ending.

slots.meaning: The classmate who was secretly feeding the mystery visitor.
slots.guidance: A kind, slightly embarrassed peer; the name tag reveals the identity, never a source of blame.

slots.meaning: The hero's recurring detective prop for recording clues.
slots.guidance: A small, carried notebook or equivalent tool the hero checks and adds to throughout.

slots.meaning: The whole bounded, explorable place the story happens inside.
slots.guidance: A safe, familiar daytime place with distinct corners; wonder over dread; no hazards.

slots.meaning: The central junction the hero returns to between every corner.
slots.guidance: A single easy-to-picture landmark (a circle, a gate, a crossroads) reachable from every branch.

slots.meaning: The quiet corner every branch's clues point toward, where the mystery is solved.
slots.guidance: A hushed, cozy nook; safe to approach; never dark or frightening.

slots.meaning: The small structure the hero hides behind near the destination.
slots.guidance: A garden-scale screen (a trellis, a teepee of plants); nothing to squeeze through unsafely.

slots.meaning: The creature's home, found at the destination.
slots.guidance: A small, tidy dwelling (a burrow, a nest); cozy, never described as a trap or hazard.

slots.meaning: The recurring bite-mark clue found on plants across several corners.
slots.guidance: A small, gentle, repeatable physical trace; never gory or alarming.

slots.meaning: The recurring footprint clue found across several corners.
slots.guidance: A small, cute track pattern distinct from the bite-mark clue; playful, not threatening.

slots.meaning: The recurring fur/feather clue found caught on twigs and roots.
slots.guidance: A soft, tiny wisp of the creature's covering; a gentle keepsake-like clue.

slots.meaning: The mystery visitor's species, used as a casual bare noun in labels and endings.
slots.guidance: A small, harmless, garden-friendly animal; never predatory or frightening.

slots.meaning: The adult member of the creature family revealed at the destination.
slots.guidance: A gentle parent figure; described tenderly, never as dangerous.

slots.meaning: The offspring of the creature family revealed at the destination.
slots.guidance: Small, playful young; the emotional payoff of the reveal.

slots.meaning: The garden plant the creature has been nibbling.
slots.guidance: A common, kid-familiar edible garden plant; the motive is hunger, never mischief.

slots.meaning: The first corner reachable from the hub, where the case begins.
slots.guidance: A planted growing-bed area; safe to search on hands and knees.

slots.meaning: The second corner reachable from the hub, a decomposing-material area.
slots.guidance: A warm, earthy work corner; safe to poke through.

slots.meaning: The third corner reachable from the hub, a small storage structure.
slots.guidance: A cluttered but kid-safe shed or shelter; nothing sharp emphasized.

slots.meaning: The fourth corner reachable from the hub, a tall-growing plant row.
slots.guidance: A green, corridor-like row of tall plants; passable underneath or beside.

slots.meaning: The fifth corner reachable from the hub, a water's-edge area.
slots.guidance: A shallow, muddy water's edge; safe footing, no deep or fast water.

slots.meaning: The dug passage found at the second corner.
slots.guidance: A small, tidy animal-sized passage; never a collapse hazard.

slots.meaning: The nibbled plant patch found on the far side of the second corner's passage.
slots.guidance: A small patch of a second plant the creature also eats; benign.

slots.meaning: The out-of-place container discovered at the third corner.
slots.guidance: A small carried container that doesn't belong on the shelf; safe to open.

slots.meaning: The spilled item found beside the out-of-place container.
slots.guidance: A small tipped-over supply (seeds, snacks); a suspicious but harmless detail.

slots.meaning: The written detail inside the container that names the friend.
slots.guidance: A simple readable label (a name tag, a note).

slots.meaning: The trail of scraps leading out of the third corner.
slots.guidance: A small, followable trail of crumbs or scraps.

slots.meaning: The pressed-down secret path found at the fourth corner.
slots.guidance: A narrow, knee-high path under the plants; passable by crawling.

slots.meaning: The cozy rest spot found along the fourth corner's secret path.
slots.guidance: A small flattened resting nook; cozy, not a hazard.

slots.meaning: The elevated vantage point at the fourth corner.
slots.guidance: A simple, stable place to stand and look over the row (a bench, a step).

slots.meaning: The physical description of the fifth corner's ground.
slots.guidance: A soft, muddy edge good for footprints; shallow and safe.

slots.meaning: The nibbled plant detail found in the mud trail at the fifth corner.
slots.guidance: A small patch of a plant the creature snacked on; benign.

slots.meaning: The harmless false-alarm creature found in the reeds.
slots.guidance: A small, sleepy, friendly animal unrelated to the mystery; a gentle red herring.

slots.meaning: The careful way the hero records the footprint clue at the first corner.
slots.guidance: A patient, careful action (sketching, tracing); rewards care.

slots.meaning: The hasty way the hero follows the footprint clue at the first corner.
slots.guidance: A quick, slightly clumsy action with a gentle lesson about slowing down.

slots.meaning: The still-and-wait approach the hero takes at the destination.
slots.guidance: A calm, patient waiting action; rewarded by the creature's approach.

slots.meaning: The offer-a-snack approach the hero takes at the destination.
slots.guidance: A gentle offering action using the crop; rewarded by the creature's approach.

slots.meaning: What the class plants to feed the creature family going forward.
slots.guidance: A small planted patch of things the creature likes to eat; cooperative and kind.

slots.meaning: What the class builds to keep the crop safe while sharing the garden.
slots.guidance: A small, low, kid-buildable barrier with a gate; fair to both hero and creature.

slots.meaning: What the hero does to share the solved mystery with the class.
slots.guidance: A simple show-and-tell action using the notebook's clues.

slots.meaning: Ending title: digging through the second corner for clues turns up nothing (setback).
slots.guidance: A warm, funny setback title; the ending must still feel content, not sad.

slots.meaning: Ending title: leaning too far at the fifth corner ends the search early (setback).
slots.guidance: A light, funny setback title about getting a little wet; never scary.

slots.meaning: Ending title: rushing the destination startles the creature away (setback).
slots.guidance: A gentle setback title naming the startled creature's retreat; a friendly miss, not a scare.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the class plants a feeding patch for the creature family (success).
slots.guidance: Positive; a shared, kind solution. Names ending e_patch.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the class builds a shared, gated barrier (success).
slots.guidance: Positive; a fair compromise for hero and creature. Names ending e_fence.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the class puts up a friendly sign and shares the garden (success).
slots.guidance: Positive; a welcoming, community solution. Names ending e_share.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the class makes watching the creature family an ongoing job (success).
slots.guidance: Positive; an ongoing, gentle stewardship role. Names ending e_watch.
